title: Investor Dinner
copy: An intimate seated dinner for investors, brand partners, and key stakeholders. The circuit begins here.

title: Founders Social
copy: A high-energy networking social for capital allocators, founders, and operators in the MXU ecosystem.

title: Yacht Hospitality
copy: Exclusive yacht experience on Miami's waters. Curated guest list. Premium hospitality. Sunset to skyline.

title: Jet Hangar
copy: MXU's flagship anchor event. Private aviation hangar, luxury cars, live performance, and Miami's most exclusive crowd.

title: Race Day Finale
copy: Closing the circuit at the Grand Prix. Private viewing, champagne, and the loudest send-off Miami can offer.
